tools.name: generate_product_photo
tools.title: Generate product ad photo
tools.description: Generate a premium, e-commerce ready product advertisement photo from a text prompt (and optional reference image data URL). Returns a PNG. Does not read or write any user data. Powered by GMAMIKO101 + Gemini.

prompt.description: Description of the product ad to generate — subject, style, mood, background, lighting, etc.

reference_image_data_url.description: Optional reference image as a data URL (data:image/png;base64,... or data:image/jpeg;base64,...). Used as the product to keep faithful.
